parsed_artifacts.content: Packet module__timer_regs__function_model_02 updates timer_regs only. Preserved APB decode, LOAD/CTRL storage, STATUS readback, and tick predicate logic. Removed unused tick_observed_count evidence-only logic to satisfy the mandatory UNUSEDSIGNAL lint repair directive. Added live unmapped_access decode used by pslverr and sequential irq_q clearing, so FM_APB_UNMAPPED_ACCESS output-rule evidence is functional rather than marker-only. CTRL reserved-bit behavior remains implemented by ctrl_read_data zero-extending enable_q and by updating only pwdata[0] on CTRL writes. PASS is not claimed because authoring plan pass_allowed is false and tool/gate packets remain open.
